description_long: This bollard features a tall, rectangular column with a series of evenly spaced horizontal slats running vertically along its front and back faces, creating a ribbed or louvered appearance. The structure is primarily metallic, with a golden-yellow finish accented by black elements, giving it a modern and industrial look. The base is a square, flat plate with visible bolts at each corner, indicating it is designed to be securely mounted to the ground. The sides of the bollard are solid and flat, contrasting with the open, slatted design of the front and back. The top of the bollard is flat and squared off, matching the overall geometric aesthetic. This design is likely intended for access control or demarcation in urban environments, such as sidewalks, parking lots, or building entrances.
description: A tall, gold and black metallic bollard with a ribbed, slatted front and back, mounted on a square base with visible bolts. Its modern, industrial design is both functional and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height and the distinctive ribbed, slatted pattern running vertically along the face.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the solid, flat profile and the narrow width of the bollard.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the same ribbed, slatted design and visible bolts at the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the flat, solid side and the narrow profile.
